name: Claudesavvy
description: Monitor Claude Code usage in real-time. Explore conversations, sub-agents, teams, and token analytics — all with clickable insights that take you straight to the detail you need. Free, open-source, and takes minutes to set up.
longDescription:
Claudesavvy helps teams monitor Claude Code usage in real time. It provides visibility into conversations, sub-agents, teams, and token analytics through a dashboard that links directly to the underlying detail for each session.

The product is designed to make Claude Code costs easier to understand and control across multiple projects. It surfaces conversation-level cost and context usage, tracks sub-agent activity, and shows team and project spend so organizations can spot trends before they become surprises.

As an open-source dashboard from a UK company, Claudesavvy is positioned as a lightweight way to add cost observability and usage controls without a long setup process.
features: Track Claude Code usage across multiple projects in real time
Drill into conversation analytics with cost, turns, and context usage per session
Monitor sub-agent exchanges with per-invocation token and cost breakdowns
Set customizable alerts and budgets to control Claude Code costs
Track team usage and aggregate spend across your organization
Analyze per-project spending to optimize resource allocation
